name: cap-iv-addin
description: Excel add-in for Capitulo IV production history, forecasts, and charts.

scripts.dev:server: office-addin-dev-certs install && webpack serve --mode development --env mode=development
scripts.start:desktop: office-addin-debugging start manifest.xml desktop --app excel --dev-server "npm run dev:server" --dev-server-port 3002
scripts.start:desktop:devtools: office-addin-debugging start manifest.xml desktop --app excel --dev-tools --dev-server "npm run dev:server" --dev-server-port 3002
